## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up and discuss Marcel's recent business ventures and potential collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel has been exploring AI-powered content creation, launching workshops, and starting an agency](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Walter has been working on using AI to augment his sales process and coaching templates](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [They discussed potentially collaborating on a workshop to share their methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Marcel is building a community around "AI-led growth" and sees big potential in this space](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Recent Ventures

  - [Launched successful AI content creation workshops, with over 30 paid attendees](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Started an agency offering AI content services, with a few initial clients](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Exploring building a community around "AI-led growth" and creating a movement](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Hired contractors in Sri Lanka and the Philippines to support the agency work](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

### Walter's AI Experiments

  - [Using AI to understand clients faster and customize sales/coaching templates](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Transforming traditional sales decks into "collaboration decks" powered by AI](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Seeing major productivity gains from leveraging AI for these processes](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Discussed doing a joint workshop to share their AI-powered methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Marcel suggested workshops are a great way to build brand, make decent money, and attract clients](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Walter was very interested based on Marcel's description](https://fathom.video/share/U1-qNXBcgzvPJXKiVfCR4pCusYfxTCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
